name: AirVape XS GO
summary: A lightweight, affordable dry-herb vaporiser with ceramic chamber and five presets, for patients starting out or wanting a simple backup.
description: At 57g the AirVape XS GO is about as light and pocketable as portables get. Single-button operation and five temperature presets keep it simple, hybrid heating with a ceramic chamber and ceramic vapour path gives clean flavour, and built-in tools mean less to carry. The 0.3-0.4g chamber suits everyday dosing. The ABS plastic body keeps cost and weight down rather than feeling like a high-end shell, which is the trade-off at this price. A sensible first vaporiser or simple backup, backed by a limited lifetime warranty.

specs.label: Dimensions
specs.value: 9.6cm L x 2.5cm W x 3.3cm H (3.8in L x 1in W x 1.3in H)
